channel.description: Which Gateway API release channel to install CRDs from. `standard` is the stable/production channel; `experimental` additionally includes newer, less stable resource kinds, plus extra experimental fields on some of the standard-channel kinds.
channel.title: channel

crds.description: Enable/disable individual CRDs. Keys match each CRD's plural name (`spec.names.plural`). Kinds only present in the experimental channel are never installed while `channel` is `standard`, regardless of their flag here.

tcproutes.description: Installs the TCPRoute CRD. Experimental channel only.
tcproutes.title: tcproutes

tlsroutes.description: Installs the TLSRoute CRD. Experimental channel only.
tlsroutes.title: tlsroutes

udproutes.description: Installs the UDPRoute CRD. Experimental channel only.
udproutes.title: udproutes

xbackendtrafficpolicies.description: Installs the XBackendTrafficPolicy CRD. Experimental channel only.
xbackendtrafficpolicies.title: xbackendtrafficpolicies

xlistenersets.description: Installs the XListenerSet CRD. Experimental channel only.
xlistenersets.title: xlistenersets

xmeshes.description: Installs the XMesh CRD. Experimental channel only.
xmeshes.title: xmeshes

crds.title: crds

global.description: Global values are values that can be accessed from any chart or subchart by exactly the same name.
global.title: global

keep.description: When `true`, adds the `helm.sh/resource-policy: keep` annotation to every CRD so `helm uninstall` (and rollbacks) won't delete them.
keep.title: keep
